---
title: "Healthcare Australia Dashboard"
description: "An interactive Shiny dashboard exploring healthcare access, demographic patterns, and health service insights across Australia."
date: 06-23-2026
image: image.png
categories: [healthcare, australia, shiny, dashboard, data visualisation, R]
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    echo: false
---

## Healthcare Australia Dashboard

This project explores healthcare-related patterns across Australia using an interactive Shiny dashboard.

The dashboard allows users to examine trends, compare regions, and interact with visualisations designed to support data-driven healthcare insights.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Key Features

-   🏥 **Healthcare-focused dashboard** for exploring Australian health data
-   📊 **Interactive visualisations** for comparing trends and patterns
-   🌏 **Regional analysis** to understand variation across locations
-   🔍 **User-driven exploration** through filters and dashboard components

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Interactive Dashboard

Use the embedded dashboard below to explore the analysis:

<iframe
src="https://ishitak.shinyapps.io/Healthcare_Australia/"
width="100%"
height="1400px"
style="border:none;">
</iframe>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Resources

-   [Live Dashboard](https://ishitak.shinyapps.io/Healthcare_Australia/)
-   [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/ishitak22/30-days-industry-analytics/tree/main/01_retail)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Built using `R`, `Shiny`, and data visualisation techniques for healthcare analytics.*
